review_text:
We don’t stay in caravan parks often, but this place was the goods! Fantastic management and staff, grounds with easily accessible sites, and facilities were clean and well maintained. The location was great being able to walk into town and along the foreshore. Would definitely stay again!
Ps. A heated pool would be great for an extra activity! That’s what usually draws us to caravan parks.
It was a fantastic stay, awesome pet friendly cabins and we loved our view... We will be back

Spotlessly clean park with large sites and very nice amenities and facilities. Highly recommended.||Great location by water with easy walks north and south on paths and beach if you prefer. Edithburgh has interesting attractions, including the best water yower art we have seen .... and good coffee!
Everything was great except the network. The town has very poor signal, so it would be good if the accommodation could ensure proper WiFi internet availability inside the cabins

We had a wonderful stay at Edithburgh Caravan Park. Sarah and Damien were so easy to deal with and incredibly helpful while we were planning our trip. The park itself is lovely and well spread out, so you don’t feel cramped, and the facilities are excellent. It was exactly what we needed for a few days to reset and relax. We highly recommend staying here!

Très bien!
Je recommande vivement ce camping
Personnel sympathique
Notre petite maison était parfaite
Propre, sentait tres bon lorsque nous sommes arrivés
BBQ bien pratique pour notre dîner
Les produits de douche sentent tres bon
Juste de lit qui était creusé au milieu donc pas confortable lorsque l'on dort a 2... un changement de matelas serait à envisager

Booked Easter long weekend at Edithburgh caravan park , war in Iran put fuel prices through the roof .
3 weeks from Easter I rang to see if I could defer my booking.
I was told they don't set fuel prices  and I loose my money if I don't turn up.
Price and availability of diesel was my concern , have rang again to see if I could defer there response
Was an email with there cancellation policy.
Didn't ask to cancel didn't ask for money back just wanted to use the booking at a later time .
No we lost our money.
Was our first and last booking .

After the owners response, she comes across as RUDE, ARROGANT and ANGRY VERY
UNPROFESSIONAL for a business owner .
Yes my wife was angry site fees were paid from her pension. ( lost her money )
Our holiday plan was to set up in Eidithburgh and visit as many towns and caravan parks on york peninsula .
We had 5 nights booked  . From 2 to 7 th
But things don't always go to plan  , as I said fuel and avalailabity was a worry.
As my wife was going to loose her money she decided we should go to Eidithburgh .
Rang  the caravan park said we would be a day late as we had a funeral on the 2nd for
Our neice who died in a car accident at port pirrie.
We didn't go after all as our heart wasn't in it

Very small I mean tiny superior cabin.$190 later we realised they had also given us a dog friendly cabin which we did not book.
Great location however.
Best part about the stay was the fantastic local pub family owned.
Great park. Stayed extra days.all amenities are spotless.
Great park, lovely sea views, excellent facilities and lovely fully grassed sits would definitely recommend.
Great Park and friendly staff thank you
A hidden secret in a beautiful little part of South Australia. A great location to use as a base camp for day trips.
Beautiful location.Great staff.Great atmospphere.Went to the band show was excellent.Very clean ammenities,well done.Enjoyable stay.Thank you.
Great and priced well
This park is a hidden jemmy. Excellent facilities.
Great welcom. Well maintained grounds.
We stayed at a relative's caravan here and it was very pleasant!  Happy to recommend!

The view is nice and the bathrooms are nice and clean, however the women's sanitary bins were full (and from the looks of it, for a while) in each cubicle and when we asked management for them to be emptied they said they would get straight onto it. Over 24 hours later (as I write this review) and they still had not been emptied. Disappointing.

Not impressed. Asked for single beds but got bunk beds, then had to ask for linen.Shower was useless the water was slowly coming out. Ants all over kitchen floor.I paid $195 per night for 3 nights it was a very very small room.Not worth it at all!Coobowie caravan Park 100% better!

Rooms were fine, had air conditioning. Location had a nice beach but chess set was broken and bouncy pillow was deflated.
Tracy was super nice!
Stayed there for 2 nights. The cabins were neat, but quite ordinary. Would help with some renovation.

Great Caravan Park, plenty of room.. excellent facilities. Beautiful green lawns , spotless amenities.. This park is well worth a visit if you haven’t been there. So much to see all around the district

We stayed 3 nights in the Pet Friendly Park Unit with Shared Bathroom.

The room was extremely spacious and tidy. It had a big outdoor deck that is shared with the adjoining unit which is great for a bigger group. The room had 1x queen bed and 1x bunk bed so could sleep up to 4 people. It had everything we could possibly need for a comfortable stay.

We were so impressed with the cleanliness of the shared bathroom facilities, they were extremely well maintained every single day which was fantastic considering how busy the caravan park was during the time of year we stayed.

Tracy, who worked on the reception desk was so friendly and always so lovely to deal with.

Edithburgh is not my preferred location on the Yorke Peninsula, however the caravan park is great.

Lovely caravan park  plenty of room on grassed sites. Amenities were spotless.  Great location   walk to town.  Staff were lovely
Thanks Edithburgh caravan park

Called ahead on the same day for a powered site, told there was plenty available and to head down.

Upon arrival, simple check in and payment process, given the keys and access codes.

Park is well maintained, fresh green grass, plenty activities if you have kids.

BBQ area is well kept, even providing baking paper for guests to cook on to keep the BBQ top clean.

Inside the kitchen are two electric stoves/ovens, and two sinks beside each one, along with microwave and large TV above the cooking area.

Plenty of fridge and freezer space. Large dining table inside, as well as ample seating around. Outside is another park style table. So plenty of cooking capacity for travellers.

The basketball half court had a tree overhanging it, so you can’t shoot any jump shots 🤣

WiFi was average, Voda reception was more than adequate for social media, emails etc.

Overall, great park, close to the jetty, close to the main strip, including the local pub, cafes and IGA.
Amazing place beautiful view and the staff is awesome
The staff welcome us with a friendly smile 😃. The cabin was clean and tidy. The grounds is very tidy. I recommend to stay there.

The location is great, close to the town and water. Plenty of sites, amenities and cabins. The sea views are beautiful, looking towards the other side of the gulf and Troubridge Island. Very quiet park, and dog friendly.
Good caravan Park
Love this caravan park, its been our go to for the past couple of years. Great location, friendly staff and really clean amenities. Good for fishing. Good size sites for vans, camping etc.

A++++
The best Caravan park and Town i have stayed in. So peaceful and quiet. Pristine clean. Not one piece of litter anywhere.
Absolutely loved it and definitely coming back.
I can live there.
If you want peace and quiet with a slow day this is the place.
Standing in the main street you can hear only birds and a light chatter.
The seating areas and grass areas along the seaside clean and peaceful.
The water is clear and the air is so fresh.

Breathe the fresh air on green grass in a clean environment next to the sea hearing only birds and wind.
Absolute heaven.

Edithburgh and Caravan Park I love you ❤️❤️❤️

Edithburgh caravan park was amazing. We loved staying in Seaview cabin with the kids. We had amazing views of the ocean for the cabin. The kids loved the playground, the jumping pillow and the giant chess board. Sarah was very helpful with where to visit while we were in town. ||Thank you so much for a great time.
Real friendly staff. Top veiw from the Cliff top location.
Ryno  let me say .reception 5 star location 5 star facilities 5 star value 5 star grounds 5 star don't go past this place it's a gem

Excellent caravan park
Helpful staff
Great views , lovely town

Excellent spot. Very friendly welcome. Park had everything we needed. Unfortunately winter brings unpredictable weather but easy to rug up.
Fishing not successful, algal bloom had killed off a lot of marine life and water very dirty after storm.
Would be a bit too crowded for us in summer so we travel in winter, parks from Ardrossan to edithburgh all low vacancies.
Pub up the road offered standard meals but also excellent fare of different style. Very good.
Would definitely stay here again in winter.

Just visits a friend staying at the park.
It looks nice and clean.
Friendly staff, clean facilities and great location.

Great location and very nice cabin, although short on plates and cutlery. But...
"A cabin, for two? Ooh we only have ONE left!" The joint was deserted, all other cabins empty except maybe one.
I think this was a ruse to support their extortionate rate. $175! We paid less than this for a 4-star hotel room.in Adelaide CBD with excellent facilities and services.
Be sure to question their claimed rates and vacancies.

We stayed in powered sites. Great service at check in with Sarah. Park is beautiful, haven't stayed for over 20 years, I was very impressed. Damien is a very committed manager too, the park is very well kept. Immaculate amenities, so accolades to the cleaners. We'll be back and will reccomend to friends. The only negative  was that the camp kitchen was only big enough for 8 people to be seated, so we never got the chance to use it. Needs to be much bigger..😊

Office staff very friendly on arrival. Everything explained well. Easy checkin. Well appointed and extremely clean  laundry/machines for card or cash use. 3 clothes lines. Nice to sit on balcony and watch the pelicans. We were lucky to see a couple of dolphins playing. Would highly recommend.
Friendly service.  Beautiful location.

The park is very well kept and all facilities are clean.  Not sure what people are here for if they don't fish.
There is no beach to speak of.
Sea view cabins are beautiful… has a spa and amazing views

We stayed at foreshore-powered sites at Edithburgh Caravan Park for four days and three nights, and we are delighted with our experience here! It’s a fantastic place, and we wish we could stay longer. We loved the tranquillity and beautiful scenery, and the locals we met were very friendly. The staff members were invaluable, especially when it came to helping us navigate through the parking lot.

We noticed that the amenities and common areas are clean and well-maintained. The park provides internet access, which was helpful for one of my family members who needed to complete a uni. assignment on time. Another family member uses Optus, which has full coverage, while I use Telstra, which unfortunately has poor coverage. However, it's still better than having no coverage, especially when compared to our previous experience at Discovery Park in Perth near the CBD. Starlink users might not face any issues with internet coverage here.

I highly recommend this place and encourage visitors to support the local community. We will return for a more extended holiday any time of the year!

Nice park in a nice town. Great for fishermen. Lovely new ablutions. Good security.|Easy drive through sites. Quiet surroundings. Not much action anywhere on Yorke Peninsula early in the week with most venues closed or on limited hours but livens up from Thursday.
Beautiful view on the beach and nice friendly staff at reception.  Definitely go back there again.
Loverly place
Fabulous stay, thank you!
Great place to stay and good service friendly staff. Nice clean caravan park

Dropped in to see if we could get in for 4 nights and was given a lovely secluded grassed site.  Amenities were clean and upgraded beautifully and the whole park was quiet and well cared for.   Definitely a lovely place to stay.
A beautiful stop-off on the way home from Dhilba Gurrndagai-Innes National Park. Edithburgh Caravan Park is a great stopover point.

Nice caravan park, would visit again. Stayed at an unpowered site. Was a particularly windy day, being in a van was fine, but the tents next to me looked about ready to blow away.

Toilets/showers were spacious & relatively clean. They had mops to clean up after yourselves which was a nice touch. They had the best camp kitchen I've seen at a campground! Very clean & multiples of everything, microwave, stove, oven, etc. Staff were friendly & accommodating.

Always honest reliable information & service.
We have stayed in their cabin, dog friendly was very clean (new)
We normally stay in our Winton 10 caravan, there are plenty of sites.
Beautiful, quiet and conveniently located caravan park.

An amazing caravan park here in Edithburgh, friendly staff, clean amenities, good size sites near the beach the kids enjoy themselves.
We look forward to our next stay here
Nice location for camping
Great place been here a couple of times now and I’ve never been disappointed

Pros: Great ocean views. Very clean camp kitchen with fridges, freezer, microwaves, toaster, electric kettles, hot sand maker, chopping board, dish washing scotch and detergent, and filtered water. Plenty of clean BBQ with cooking sheets provided. Clean bathrooms. Clean keyed ensuites. Good pressure hot water. Laundry with new washing machines - can be paid with card. Jumping pillow, little playground and giant chess for kids. Close to fishing spots - we caught some squids. There is a fish cleaning hut. Cheaper than the other sites around the area. Grass unpowered sites. Feel secure with security cameras.
Great park with actual green grass, very clean amenities.

Excellent park. Showers and toilets exemplary. Highly recommended.
Perfect camp kitchen very well appointed and clean

Great clean amenities, very lovely staff! Very nice area in general !
Stayed 2 nights, did some crabbing also 😊😉
recommend!🤩
Great location and the price is right

What a wonderful place. Loved our time at Edithburgh Caravan Park. Fantastic caravan sites and private separate ensuite amenities which were spotless. Hosts were welcoming and helpful and shared their local knowledge about the Yorke Peninsula so we were able to see so much of the area.
Great park .friendly staff, pet friendly. Fish off your choice of 2 jetties.

VERY POOR customer service
The lady that works in the office was extremely rude
If you are a smoker be careful as you may randomly get told you have to pay a $200 fine or get out

Beautiful park. Clean lovely views.  Stayed extra as so good
Management phenomenal 👏
Delightful spot with magic views of the coastline.  Clean and super tidy. Staff were very pleasant at check-in and again when leaving.. definitely 5 Star... thanks team.

Good spot to stay for a night or two with our dog. Nice views and super quiet. Lovely staff and friendly guests/permanent residents. Camp kitchen and bathrooms were super clean, couldn't fault the cleanliness. But the light going out so fast in the bathrooms is super annoying and had to use a torch to continue my shower. An alternative to using a key to enter bathrooms would be great also. Outdated methods to the bathroom security and lighting, updates would be good for this park.

Simply awesome, I loved this park.
Highly recommend something for everyone. Fantastic booking in, facilities are great. Sites are great.
Amenities are clean & great music.
Close to hotels, good food, petrol station clise by.
I'm definitely going back & taking friends.
Edithburgh another piece of Heaven in SA, especially if you like fishing👍💯
Excellent

The reception folks were super nice and very helpful in sharing information with us!  The front porch was great for drying our dive gear (we went diving during the giant cuttlefish migration), and our cabin was about two blocks from the jetty!
What a gorgeous park . Terrific location, friendly staff and great amenities.  We got lucky and saw a pod of Dolphins. Wish we could have stayed longer.!!
Good escape!!
Can't fault this park, the staff are super friendly and prompt, the amenities are well cleaned and maintained. Kid friendly, dog friendly... Amazing!
I love the Deluxe Cabin that we stayed here. Beachfront and lots of room complete with cooking facilities and amenities.

A friendly, quiet park right on the water, offering fantastic views and a convenient boat ramp. There's a great play area for the kids to enjoy. The park's facilities, including the toilets, showers, and laundry, are clean and well-maintained. During my stay, the owners hosted music nights and pancake breakfasts, fostering a wonderful community atmosphere. Their efforts to create an enjoyable experience are truly commendable. Great work all around!
Love love love this place. Sarah and Damian are amazing! They offer so much and the facilities are awesome!! They get involved with everything happening here. So nice to feel welcomed!!
Very well maintained park. Amenities spotless.

Great park, good sites, very clean, amazing staff. 10/10.
Could not recommend highly enough.
All positive.  You will enjoy your stay.
If you’re on the Yorke Peninsular, do yourself a favour and stay at this Caravan Park. Nice big level sites, great amenities and helpful staff. Reasonable rates during the offseason too !
Another good 👍 park. From there the bottom end of the York peninsula is available. The seafood didn't seem as expensive there.
A lovely place  very clean and tidy  plenty of room  for our caravan
Just beautiful.  Everything you could want and need in a caravan park!

Great caravan park located right on the water amazing views across the Yorke Penulinsula big sites and the amentaties are so clean and tidy a very friendly park amazing staff at reception so helpful and a short walk into to town although we had a courtesy bus from the local pub pick us up and drop us off after a beautiful meal at the Toubridge hotel 10/10
Love staying here , friendly people clean amenities.

What an amazing place Edithburgh is. Park owners were just so nice. Pointed us in the right direction for what's to see in area. Park toilets and cooking area A level.
With 2 fishing piers the Park had a fish cleaning area too with pelican's awaiting left overs.
We planned to stay 2 nights but stayed 3 to fit everything in..
Great fishing spot even seeing dolphins coming close by.
We will be back and stay here again..

We recently stayed 7 great nights at the Edithburgh Caravan Park on a spacious grassy powered site. Very clean and tidy well kept park catering for anything from a tent to a motor home. Modern clean amenities and a well equipped camp kitchen. Beautiful views and awesome sunsets, if you are lucky enough you can see the Dolphins swim by in the morning.
Big thumbs up. 👍🏻
Julie & Robin.

Fantastic..  great park for all ages.. dog friendly
Plenty to do in Edithbug

Very well organised caravan park. Managers were always seen cleaning and maintaining property. Organised activities for everyone over the easter break. They fitted us in over the Easter period when they were booked up. Amenities were upgraded and kept clean. Great size site and lots of grass. Great position park on the eater and walking distance to wharfs and shops.

A great little caravan park that caters to all sizes of caravans, camper vans, camper trailers, tents and mobile homes. We had a large grassy site with amazing views along the coast. Modern and clean amenities complete the picture.

Currently staying at the Edithburgh caravan park. Great location. Beautiful tidy park. New amenities which are well kept. The service by management and staff is outstanding. The Easter activities free of charge were just amazing. The kids and adults had so much fun. Sarah did a fantastic job, it will be a weekend the kids remember.

Such a beautiful spot to base yourself and explore the surroundings.
Great grassy spots, clean bathrooms, and great kitchen/bbq area.

Friendly check in, Fabulous location, lots of ocean front sites, clean amenities, recommend and will return. Lovely little town, with a small IGA. Great for crabbing and fishing. Great value with GDay membership
I stayed in a nice modern cabin. Great spot if you have a boat and or enjoy seafront scenery. The town is very small and everything closes early. Recommended this place for a quiet getaway.
Well kept caravan park with very clean amenities. Sites are good size with easy access. Great views over the water

Very nice caravan park with some nice grassy sites on the foreshore. They cost a little extra but worth it. Facilities are good but a shower screen would be useful to save having to mop the dry off area and also getting your things wet while in the shower. A simple Curtin screen would make it a lot better. Just my thought. All up a nice spot to stay. Close to jetty, shops and pub. Oh try the bait and tackle shop while in town. Just ask where to go fishing. Regards the caravan park. All good. Jim
Love it here. One of the best parks in our travels over the past 8 months.
Excellent location, nice amenities, and clean sites.

We stayed in the sea view cabin and the views did not disappoint.
The cabin had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. Cabin was clean and my husband loved the coffee machine. Would recommend staying here.
If you love sea views you will love the relaxed atmosphere of a quiet park.

We slept here one night. The price for a Power Site does not correspond to what is offered. The toilets and showers are completely old. Given its condition, you can't say whether it was clean. However, the location by the sea is very good. The employees are friendly. The laundry was very new and modern. On some machines, payments can be made electronically.

￼
Adelaide cup long weekend, it was very hot with a North wind. Pleasant area close to the sea, reasonable facilities at the park.

We enjoyed a lovely couple of nights at the Edithbugh Caravan Park. The park is located right on the waterfront with beautiful manicured (and well watered) lawn caravan sites. The toilet/shower facilities were modern and spotlessly clean. This place is a paradise for fishermen and boaties but was also very enjoyable for people like us who came for the atmosphere, peace, and beautiful vista. I'd give it a 4.5, if I could.
Loved our stay great views friendly safe park
Great spot.  Right on the foreshore.  Jetty close by. Awesome
Beautiful view, from our caravan sites, staff extremely friendly and helpful.
Very tidy park, great facilities if you're a fisher person with a boat and you can't fault the proximity to the ramp, you are literally right behind it.

Lovely caravan park. Deluxe ocean view cabin is roomy, clean and well appointed. The views from the lounge and deck are fabulous. The park itself is well maintained, clean and everyone is friendly and close to the pubs and cafes if required.

One of the cleanest caravan parks I have ever stayed in!
Sarah and Damien that run the park are so friendly and welcoming.
Would have to say best caravan park on the Yorke Peninsula.
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5 stars from our Family!

Such a beautiful place and everyone is so friendly and caravan park is just amazing
Thank you for having us site 7
Great caravan park with great service and good amenities. Right on the water.

Great spot for all forms of travel and accommodation, even on a busy weekend the site and amenities stayed clean and staff were helpful and friendly. We camped on an unpowered site and had a fantastic weekend. Close by lots of great beaches and easy walking distance to jetty and shops in town.

By far the best caravan park I've stayed in. The amenities and community feel are next level. Rain shower heads in the bathroom, camp kitchen with great features, paper towel dispenser near the BBQs, disposable baking paper sheets for a bbq cover, basketball court, bouncing pillow, lawn chess board, clothes line and dog friendly.

Then the community aspect where Sarah and Damian (managers) host frequent bbqs and morning pancakes. Offering for people to come together, eat food, have drinks and share stories. Just gold coin donations, which they then donate.

I can't recommend them more! Great location, close to the jetty and breakwater, pubs, bottle shops, supermarkets all close by.

Absolutely loved it.
Great place. Little cabin had everything you’d expect. Kids love the bounce pillow. Easy walk into town and also access to the coastal walking path.
Nice place.

Great park if you get the right powered site. The area we were in had a kind of  crush refine base, which with the windy conditions meant we spent our time wiping dust dust out of our faces. I could see lots of lovely campsites, unfortunately at $43 per night, we were not allocated one of the nice grassed areas. Maybe it was more expensive in the larger, nicer areas.
Very clean and very helpful stuff. Will be back

The receptionist was friendly and helpful and the toilets were modern and clean. Great to be near the ocean. Unpowered site good covering grass and level and trees at the back. Enjoyed our stay. Would definitely come again.

We found the park very clean, and spacious and has everything you need for a comfortable stay. The staff were welcoming and very friendly and accommodating. We stayed in one of the deluxe cabins. It was a pleasant surprise. Modern, spacious and comfortable. They're right on the water front so you get amazing views too. We will definitely be back.
Great spot overlooking the sea. Great facilities. No one warned us about the very windy conditions common to this area!

Loved our stay here. The staff were very friendly and really helpful. The amenities were always clean and beautiful hot showers. It was only a short walk into town for a great meal at the pubs or the corner cafe. There is also a nice little convenience store that also has takeaways. Around town, you can find some artwork to look at, and if you're lucky, one of the local seals may say hello.
Lovely break away from Adelaide 😁

Great little caravan park, with excellent friendly staff. They put on some free live entertainment plus pancakes for the long weekend we stayed and also cooked some burgers to purchase on the Saturday night.
Toilets and showers were spotless. Lawns very neat. Credit to the caretakers.

All amenities available. Beautiful views and fishing spots plus boat ramp,jetty.
Holiday by the sea.

New management have truly changed this place.Stayed for 4 nights and it was amazing. We had a beautiful grassed site and it was truly relaxing. Everything was so clean and the staff where so friendly. We can't wait to stay again.
Clean and comfy
Great park, great location, clean facilities and awesome staff! Damo and Sarah are awesome Park Managers/Hosts and the Office Manager 'Poppy' (kittycat) is way too cute!  Can't wait to go back ❤️

The caravan park hosted a burger night, but unfortunately, we received last-minute notice on the same day that the camp kitchen would be closed from 3 PM. This was quite inconvenient for us as tent campers, as we heavily relied on the kitchen facilities for meal preparation. Moreover, the campsites were cramped and covered in gravel, leading to a congested feeling. A grass site would have greatly improved our experience.

The restroom situation was far from ideal, with a majority of toilets being inoperable, resulting in long queues. There's a clear need for more functional toilet facilities. Despite initially booking a two-night stay, we decided to cut our trip short and returned home on the same day due to our dissatisfaction with the overall conditions.
Great caravan park. Highly recommend.
Very helpful and friendly staff, really accommodating, very clean park!
The park has been updated since i was last here, looks great and great facilities
Managers were so helpful, very clean and well maintained park.
Close to a Jetty and boat launching. No beach to speak of. Walking distance to main street.

Great place to stay ,good sea views from the cabin I stayed in   bed was comfy  but a bit cold  shower was good ,quiet and a easy walk to street  rain water tank for water for your kettle         cabin was really good
Clean old style amenities  a credit to the cleaners
Great Place .
Absolutely phenomenal! Views are spectacular, plenty of school holiday activities. The downfall for us was that the facilities were not cleaned sufficiently or frequently enough for our liking.
Fantastic park, staff were great very friendly, amenities were spotless clean.
